conversation_history.content: Generate a research question on harvest maturity for tomatoes in LMICs.

result.research_question: How can AI-enabled harvest maturity assessment improve postharvest decision-making for tomato in resource-constrained LMIC systems?
result.working_title: AI-enabled harvest maturity assessment for tomato in resource-constrained LMIC systems
result.possible_contribution: This study could clarify how AI tools can support better harvest timing, reduce postharvest losses, and improve value-chain decisions.
